languages.text: "Стою гадаю, как у тебя не отваливается язык сыпать таким количеством Возвышенных Терминов".

traits.locale_text: "Стою гадаю, как у тебя не отваливается язык сыпать таким количеством Возвышенных Терминов".

languages.text: "I am wondering how your tongue hasn't yet gone numb from these pompous yet shallow platitudes."
languages.original_text: "Стою гадаю, как у тебя не отваливается язык сыпать таким количеством Возвышенных Терминов".

traits.locale_text: "I am wondering how your tongue hasn't yet gone numb from these pompous yet shallow platitudes."
"I am wondering how your tongue hasn't yet gone numb from these pompous yet shallow platitudes."
"I am wondering how your tongue hasn't yet gone numb from these pompous yet shallow platitudes."
"I am wondering how your tongue hasn't yet gone numb from these pompous yet shallow platitudes."
"I am wondering how your tongue hasn't yet gone numb from these pompous yet shallow platitudes."

languages.text: "Ich wundere mich, dass Ihre Zunge noch nicht taub geworden ist von diesen schwülstigen, aber seichten Plattitüden."
languages.original_text: "I am wondering how your tongue hasn't yet gone numb from these pompous yet shallow platitudes."

traits.locale_text: "Ich wundere mich, dass Ihre Zunge noch nicht taub geworden ist von diesen schwülstigen, aber seichten Plattitüden."

languages.text: "Je me demande comment votre langue n'est pas encore engourdie par ces platitudes pompeuses et superficielles."
languages.original_text: "I am wondering how your tongue hasn't yet gone numb from these pompous yet shallow platitudes."

traits.locale_text: "Je me demande comment votre langue n'est pas encore engourdie par ces platitudes pompeuses et superficielles."

languages.text: "Me pregunto cómo no se te ha entumecido aún la lengua con estas perogrulladas pomposas y superficiales".
languages.original_text: "I am wondering how your tongue hasn't yet gone numb from these pompous yet shallow platitudes."

traits.locale_text: "Me pregunto cómo no se te ha entumecido aún la lengua con estas perogrulladas pomposas y superficiales".

languages.text: "Merak ediyorum, diliniz bu kendini beğenmiş ama sığ basmakalıp laflar yüzünden nasıl hala uyuşmadı?"
